description: Add a tenant-scoped MSP SSO login-domain persistence model (migration + schema).
Add indexes to support fast domain lookup and tenant-scoped domain management operations.
Add server action to list configured MSP SSO login domains for the current tenant.
Add server action to create/update/remove tenant MSP SSO login domains.
Normalize login domains to lowercase and validate domain syntax in settings actions.
Implement domain conflict/ambiguity handling policy in domain-management actions.
Add Providers settings UI section for tenant MSP SSO login domains.
Add add/remove/edit controls for multiple login domains in the Providers UI.
Show domain validation/conflict failures as neutral actionable UI errors in Providers settings.
Add `POST /api/auth/msp/sso/discover` endpoint for MSP SSO domain discovery.
Parse and validate input email in discovery endpoint and derive normalized domain.
Apply rate limiting to discovery endpoint with neutral response behavior on limit hits.
Resolve tenant context from domain mapping without any full-email user existence lookup.
Treat ambiguous domain mappings as unresolved (fail-closed for tenant resolution).
Compute tenant-scoped Google readiness from tenant provider secrets when tenant is resolved.
Compute tenant-scoped Microsoft readiness from tenant provider secrets when tenant is resolved.
Compute app-fallback provider availability when tenant is unresolved.
Return invariant discovery response schema `{ ok: true, providers: [] }` with allowed provider IDs only.
Add signed discovery-context cookie helper carrying tenant/source/providers metadata only.
Set and rotate discovery-context cookie from discovery endpoint; clear stale cookie on invalid input.
Update MSP `SsoProviderButtons` to call discovery endpoint when a valid email is entered.
Keep SSO buttons disabled while discovery is pending or email is invalid.
Enable only providers returned by discovery and keep unsupported providers disabled.
Persist last-selected provider locally and preselect it when still eligible (without bypassing server checks).
Update `/api/auth/msp/sso/resolve` to consume discovery-context cookie for tenant/provider source selection.
Reject resolver attempts when requested provider is not in discovered allowed provider set.
When discovery context is missing/invalid, resolver falls back to app-level provider path only.
Keep resolver external failure behavior generic/non-enumerating across unknown user and known user paths.
Keep OAuth callback user mapping behavior unchanged for unknown users (no pre-auth user detection path).
Keep MSP credentials login flow unchanged while adding domain-based SSO discovery.
Keep client portal login and client SSO affordances unchanged.
Document provider setup order including tenant login-domain setup before MSP SSO use.
Update env/docs guidance for app-fallback behavior when domain is unresolved.
Ensure CE and EE route/component wiring both use the same discovery + resolver gating behavior.
Preserve existing `/auth/msp/signin` URLs and existing emailed links without hostname migration requirements.
